channel.title: Azure Blueprints on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Blueprints on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: Migrate from Azure Blueprints by January 31, 2027
item.description:
Azure Blueprints retirement has been extended from July 11, 2026 to January 31, 2027. Phased retirement starts July 31, 2026, when creating new blueprint definitions will no longer be supported.

  • Source: Azure Updates
